dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires 2+ indicator confirmation of trend direction. Implemented using: (1) price direction (close vs prev_close), (2) trend strength via ADX_14 > 25 threshold, and (3) momentum confirmation via MACD cross. ADX > 25 indicates established trend. MACD crossover serves as primary reversal signal for exits. Support CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction with separate long/short entry conditions.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires 2+ indicator confirmation of trend direction. Implemented using: (1) price direction (close vs prev_close), (2) trend strength via ADX_14 > 25 threshold, and (3) momentum confirmation via MACD cross. ADX > 25 indicates established trend. MACD crossover serves as primary reversal signal for exits. Support CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction with separate long/short entry conditions.

source_rule_text: A trader should wait for technical indicators to confirm trend direction before entering, rather than entering impulsively based on market movement alone, to avoid losses from premature entry.
